title: Neurosama Music Discs
description: Want to listen to some of Neuro's songs in game? This is the pack for you!
body:
# READ ME
If your Minecraft version is 1.20.1 or later, this resource pack will not work properly, and songs will be cut off early. To fix this, download the [Jukebox Custom Music Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix) mod, and it should work after that

# **Plans**
- Add compatibility for a specific version upon request (Feel free to DM me via discord)
- Change music upon release of the next big song to include it, and switching karaoke songs if requested or applicable

# Main Songs
- cat: LIFE
- Pigstep: BOOM
- 5: NEVER
- otherside: Colorful Array
- ward: Crazy Fuckin' Robot Body (Official Cover)
- chirp: Chinatown Blues (Official Cover)
# Karaoke and Other Songs
*Subject to be replaced once more Main Songs get released
- blocks: world.execute(me)
- far: VIRUS
- mall: Sad Machine
- mellohi: evil (feat. evil) (Camila Cover)
- stal: Tententengoku Jigokukoku 
- strad: Machine Love
- wait: Knock Yourself Out
- 11: Surprise
- 13: Surprise >:)
### 1.20.0+ 
- Relic: Free Bird
### 1.21.0+
- Creator: Digital Girl (Neuro)
- Creator (Music Box): Digital Girl (Evil)
- Precipice: M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE  SHOT!
### 1.21.6+
- Tears: LIFE (acoustic)
### 1.21.7+
- Lava Chicken: Remote Control

# Final Notes

Feedback is also appreciated. I mostly made this for myself (with next to zero pack-making knowledge), but I figured other Swarm Members could like it too. 

I or this project am not officially associated or affiliated with Vedal, Vedal AI and their assets, the Neurocord, or any of the original music listed aboce. I do not own any of the copyright.
